articles.title: Container falls off speeding trailer, causes traffic snarl in Port Klang
articles.summary: SHAH ALAM: Traffic was congested along Jalan Kem in Port Klang, near here, today after a container fell off a trailer believed to have been speeding. Read full story

articles.title: PM Anwar concludes Jakarta visit after meeting with Prabowo
articles.summary: JAKARTA: Prime Minister Datuk Seri Anwar Ibrahim has concluded his special visit to Jakarta on Friday (March 27) after meeting Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto at the Istana Merdeka here. Read fu

articles.title: Fourteen rescued, seven nabbed in Melaka human trafficking raids
articles.summary: MELAKA: Police detained seven individuals for alleged involvement in human trafficking and rescued 14 others believed to be victims of forced labour here on Friday (March 27). Read full story

articles.title: Body of teen found after suspected croc attack

articles.summary: PETALING JAYA: Tan Sri Muhyiddin Yassin has questioned the government's preparedness in facing the economic challenges resulting from the Middle East crisis. Read full story

articles.title: WFH benefits both bosses and workers, says HR Ministry
articles.summary: PETALING JAYA: Private sector bosses have been urged to consider introducing flexible work arrangements, including work from home (WFH), based on their operational needs. Read full story
